title: Automations utilizing Mirror Number Columns
excerpt: It would be amazing if we could use Number Mirror columns within a board. We have multiple input boards coming from different types of forms and being able to do math and operations on the numbers that they all output in…

posts.author: Tanner.Spurgeon1 (Tanner Spuregon)
posts.cookedHtml: It would be amazing if we could use Number Mirror columns within a board. We have multiple input boards coming from different types of forms and being able to do math and operations on the numbers that they all output in a central board would be an amazing automation.
